papers.title_en: Change-Aware Self-Adaptive AI-Aided Kalman Filters With Neural Change Point Detection
papers.authors: Wenyi Zhang, Xiaoyong Ni, Nir Shlezinger, Zengfu Wang
papers.evidence: 深度学习增强的自适应滤波用于动态系统状态估计
papers.tldr: 状态估计中模型失配、噪声未知和时变变化是挑战。现有AI辅助卡尔曼滤波器易受分布变化影响。本文提出CASA-KalmanNet，集成神经变化点检测模块CPDNet，通过监测内部特征提供可靠性指标，动态调节在线学习。在模型失配下性能优于现有方法，接近全知最优，实现数据高效的自适应。
papers.abstract_en: Reliable state estimation in dynamical systems is often challenged by model mismatches, unknown noise statistics, and temporal variations. While AI-aided Kalman filters such as KalmanNet leverage deep learning to enhance classical estimation, they remain vulnerable to distribution shifts and lack mechanisms for autonomous adaptation. This work introduces Change-Aware Self-Adaptive KalmanNet (CASA-KalmanNet), an online adaptation framework that integrates a dedicated neural module, termed CPDNet, to monitor the interpretable internal features of KalmanNet and provide soft indicators of reliability degradation. These indicators dynamically regulate an online learning process, enabling data-efficient and timely adaptation to both abrupt and gradual changes in the system without requiring additional state labels from the changed regime. Numerical experiments on linear and nonlinear state-space models show that CASA-KalmanNet consistently outperforms existing learning-based filters under model mismatch, while approaching the accuracy of optimal classical methods with full domain knowledge.
